chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 116 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.568/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 15.09.2025 On 08.09.2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received. The petition is liable to be dismissed; however, in the interest of justice, the matter is adjourned to 15-09-2025.Let notice be issued to the petitioner, and intimation notice be sent to his counsel for the next date of hearing.” Today again neither petitioner nor his Counsel is present. This Petition is pending since, 2023 without any useful progress, whereas, no such concrete efforts have been taken by the Petitioner and his Counsel in pursuing the matter. The conduct of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
